defects.title: build_confirmed_config assumes GUI workflow
defects.description: Orchestrator Step 8 calls build_io_ring_confirmed_config which requires the GUI/frontend confirmation flow. In CLI mode it either fails or is unnecessary. Generators can consume the intent graph directly with consume_confirmed_only=False.
defects.fix_description: Added skip_editor_confirmation parameter to AMS-IO-Agent confirmed_config_builder (T28 & T180). When True, filler insertion runs but GUI editor wait is skipped. Propagated through io_ring_generator_tool.build_io_ring_confirmed_config. CLI workflows can now use: build_io_ring_confirmed_config(..., skip_editor_confirmation=True) or skip Step 8 entirely and use consume_confirmed_only=False in generators.

defects.title: check_virtuoso_connection function does not exist
defects.description: Orchestrator Step 10 and scripts/check_virtuoso_connection.py import check_virtuoso_connection from src.tools.io_ring_generator_tool, but this function does not exist in that module. The correct approach is to use rb_exec from src.tools.bridge_utils.
defects.fix_description: Updated scripts/check_virtuoso_connection.py to use rb_exec from src.tools.bridge_utils instead of non-existent check_virtuoso_connection function. Now executes simple SKILL command 'sprintf(nil "test")' to verify Virtuoso connection via ramic_bridge.

defects.title: Python virtual environment not specified
defects.description: The orchestrator and wrapper scripts do not specify that AMS-IO-Agent's venv must be used. System python3 lacks required deps (smolagents etc). The venv at AMS-IO-Agent/venv/bin/python3 has them. SKILL.md and scripts should document or enforce venv usage.
defects.fix_description: Added comprehensive venv documentation to SKILL.md Prerequisites section. Documented that AMS-IO-Agent/venv/bin/python3 must be used for Tier 2 tools. Explained that wrapper scripts handle venv automatically via sys.path manipulation and AMS_IO_AGENT_PATH.
